violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage * was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. - Refrigerator was temp'd at 48*F. No potentially hazardous food stored in this unit, only condiments and bread.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling * were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. - Ceiling above dry storage food items and to-go boxes had ripped insulation.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in the proper location to protect from contamination. Clean utensils stored in dirty container near the upright freezer. Clean utensils should be stored in a clean location.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with waste receptacle as needed. Waste receptacle was not available for the handwashing sink near the 3 compartment sink. Hand washing sinks should be provided with a means for disposing paper towels.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Exposed studs, joists or rafters were not covered with smooth, nonabsorbent and easily cleanable material. Storage area with garage door access to the outside found with exposed studs and insulation on the walls and ceiling. Storage areas should be constructed of smooth, nonabsorbent, easily cleanable materials.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
